title: The core CPI rose 0.22% in Feb, in line with expectations.
text: The core CPI rose 0.22% in Feb, in line with expectations. https://x.com/nicktimiraos/status/2031710643712036918?s=46
content:
The core CPI rose 0.22% in Feb, in line with expectations. https://x.com/nicktimiraos/status/2031710643712036918?s=46
X (formerly Twitter)
Nick Timiraos (@NickTimiraos) on X
The core CPI rose 0.22% in Feb, in line with expectations.

That lowered the 12-month rate to 2.46%.

Core inflation was 2.3% annualized over the previous six months.

Both are the lowest readings in five years.
